args:
set -eu
for ns in compile-cache flashinfer-autotune-cache; do
  cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- plan --format json --cache-namespace "$ns" --readiness correctness | jq -e '.structural_identity.plan_identity' >/dev/null
done
if cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- plan --format json --cache-namespace nonsense-cache > /tmp/fuzz-cache-namespace-inputs.out 2> /tmp/fuzz-cache-namespace-inputs.err; then
  echo 'invalid cache namespace unexpectedly succeeded' >&2
  exit 1
fi
grep -q 'empty compile-region closure' /tmp/fuzz-cache-namespace-inputs.err
printf 'fuzz-cache-namespace-inputs\n'
